caption: A woman with dark hair, identified by the on-screen text "Nancy Ramya," is captured in a medium close-up shot against a plain, light-colored wall. She is wearing a striped, dark-colored shirt and large black over-ear headphones. To her left, a sheer gold-colored curtain with a blue border hangs vertically. Behind her to the right is a light-colored horizontal surface. Across the sequence of frames, she is speaking, and her facial expressions shift as she talks. In the initial frames, her mouth is open mid-sentence with a focused expression. As the sequence progresses, her expression softens into a smile, revealing her teeth. Her head remains relatively centered, and her gaze shifts slightly as she communicates. The lighting remains consistent throughout, and the background remains static.
